rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to component ports, not implementation scopes
Use visible feature names and concrete bounds for input assumptions and output guarantees in component type contracts
generic_rules: Declare helper booleans for range checks using visible identifiers and literal bounds
Ensure AGREE contract expressions match the actual types of the referenced identifiers
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` for boolean helper declarations in AGREE contracts
Structure assumptions and guarantees with clear variable names and valid AADL feature references
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts
